rows.label: tlk000024_msg0001
rows.name:
It seems you've all been
through quite a bit as well.

rows.label: tlk000024_msg0002
rows.name:
I was surprised to see
how much you've grown
since we fought in Torigo.

rows.label: tlk000024_msg0003
rows.name:
You were reliable when we fought
together, too... Are you starting
to master Heaven's Holy Grail power?
